snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

**Doctor Doom’s True Plan Explained | Avengers: Doomsday Theory**

What if **Doctor Doom** isn’t the villain of *Avengers: Doomsday*… but the only one trying to save reality itself?

In this cinematic fan theory, we uncover the hidden truth behind **Avengers: Doomsday** — a story where Doomsday isn’t destruction, but a **cosmic reset protocol**, and **Doctor Doom** becomes the guardian of existence itself.

This theory explores:

* The true meaning of **Doomsday**
* Doctor Doom’s multiversal origin
* The Avengers’ impossible choice
* Chaos vs order
* Freedom vs survival
* The dark future of the multiverse
* A reality where heroes may be wrong
* A universe where Doom may be right

This is not just a theory — it’s a **cinematic Marvel-style story** about sacrifice, destiny, and the cost of saving existence.

snippet.title: Metro 2039 - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Wishlist METRO 2039  
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10009337

Journey into the dark heart of the Metro  

METRO 2039 takes you to the dark heart of the Moscow Metro where the last survivors of the nuclear apocalypse cling to existence in the tunnels and subways of the ruined city, hope is lost… the future looks bleak... if there is one.

snippet.description:
LALAKÉ est une série sénégalaise captivante qui plonge dans les réalités sociales, politiques et culturelles du Sénégal avec une profondeur émotionnelle et narrative unique. Dans cet épisode 2 de la saison 2, les intrigues se complexifient et les personnages font face à des choix difficiles, dévoilant les tensions sous-jacentes de la société sénégalaise moderne.

Dans cet épisode, suivez les péripéties de Soumboulou Bathily, un(e) protagoniste complexe qui lutte pour la trahison. Entre amitié, trahisons, espoirs et désillusions, les événements prennent une tournure inattendue. Les dialogues poignants, l'authenticité des décors et la richesse des personnages font de cette série un incontournable pour tous les amateurs de récits puissants et touchants.

Ne manquez pas cet épisode crucial de LALAKÉ !

Uajuncell
Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma
Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma
Lo so, lo so, lo so, lo so
Sono scappato via di casa
In mezzo ai figli della strada
Però, però, però, però

Ti rivedo lì affacciata
Che mi chiami tutte le ore
Suona Pino, lo scarrafone
Mi dà un bacio dalla terrazza, come se passa la processione
Vola una tovaglia bianca
E tu sei là sola e santa ca’ ma’ può perdunà
O mà, o mà
Ma dimmi mà (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Ti porto a ballare mà (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Il cuore fa male ma, stasera il mare non lo sa
Ce fa pazzià oi mà oi mà (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Na-na-na-na-na-na
Madre mia proteggi la mia via
L’ho vista giù al porto al Santa Maria
Sembrava una Dea, ma non lo sapeva
Lungo mare, malinconia
Non parla ma gli occhi fanno la spia
E tu lo sai già (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Che sei stata il mio primo amore
Io so’ sempre il tuo scarrafone

Ma dimmi mà (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Ti porto a ballare mà (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Il cuore fa male ma, stasera il mare non lo sa
Ce fa pazzià, oh ma, oh ma (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Na-na-na-na-na-na (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Vedo un bambino pescare al porto di Santa Maria
Torna una piccola nave c’è un’altra che va via
Vola una tovaglia bianca
E tu sei la sola santa cà mà può perdunà
Oi mà, oi mà
Ma dimmi mà
Ti porto a ballare mà

Ce fa pazzià, oh ma, oh ma (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)
Na-na-na-na-na-na (Oh ma, oh ma, oh ma, oh ma)

Lyrics

I know that the bar closes at 11
I hope you never finish that beer
You know all the words to “Just Like Heaven”
And I know why he wrote them
Now that you’re standing right here

Ohh
One night I was bored in bed
And stalked you on the internet
It’s feminine intuition
‘Cuz I always had a vision of us standing like this
All pressed up in the bathroom line
You’re looking like an angel on the walls of Versailles
The most alive I’ve ever been
But kiss me and I might drop dead

And I feel like I might throw up
Left hook, right punch to the gut
You’re so so pretty boy
I’m paranoid I made you up
Yeah I’d love it if you walked me home
If you promised we could go real slow
‘Cuz I got chewing gum
And a bunch of stuff I’d like to know
Like, have you ever been to Japan?
Or taken that Eurostar to France?
I’ve been dropping hints all night
That I’d love it if you held my hand, goddamn
And then maybe we could make-makeout
